name: Jhalak Man Gandarbha
profileSummary: Jhalak Man Gandarbha was a Nepali folk singer. He was known for popularizing Gaine Geet, or Gandharbha Sangeet, a popular type of folk song sung by the Gaine or Gandharbha. He was the first Gaine singer to record Gaine songs and is known for bringing the voices of indigenous and ordinary people into the mass media. Aamale Sodhlin Ni  is his most popular song, which narrates the death of a Nepali soldier on a foreign battle ground.
